meta.title: MathSpark — Concept Dependency Graph (The Math Skill Tree)
meta.description: 100 concept nodes with ~120 prerequisite edges. Shows which concepts depend on which others, enabling smart learning path recommendations.

nodes.name: Counting & Number Names
nodes.description: Count objects, read and write numbers up to 1000

nodes.name: Place Value System
nodes.description: Understand ones, tens, hundreds, thousands — what each digit is worth

nodes.name: Comparing & Ordering Numbers
nodes.description: Use >, <, = to compare. Arrange in ascending/descending order

nodes.name: Rounding Numbers
nodes.description: Round to nearest 10, 100, 1000

nodes.name: Roman Numerals
nodes.description: Read and write Roman numerals, convert to/from Hindu-Arabic

nodes.name: Integers
nodes.description: Positive & negative numbers, number line, absolute value

nodes.name: Even & Odd Numbers
nodes.description: Properties: even+even, odd×odd, divisibility by 2

nodes.name: Addition
nodes.description: Add numbers with and without carrying

nodes.name: Subtraction
nodes.description: Subtract with borrowing, word problems

nodes.name: Multiplication
nodes.description: Times tables, multi-digit multiplication

nodes.name: Division
nodes.description: Long division, division with remainder

nodes.name: BODMAS / Order of Operations
nodes.description: Correct order: Brackets, Orders, Div/Mult, Add/Sub

nodes.name: Number Properties
nodes.description: Commutative, associative, distributive, identity, inverse

nodes.name: Factors & Multiples
nodes.description: Find all factors, common factors, multiples

nodes.name: Prime & Composite Numbers
nodes.description: Identify primes, prime factorisation, factor trees

nodes.name: HCF (Highest Common Factor)
nodes.description: Find HCF by listing, prime factorisation, division

nodes.name: LCM (Least Common Multiple)
nodes.description: Find LCM, HCF×LCM = product relationship

nodes.name: Understanding Fractions
nodes.description: Numerator, denominator, types: proper, improper, mixed

nodes.name: Equivalent Fractions
nodes.description: Find equivalent fractions, simplify to lowest terms

nodes.name: Comparing Fractions
nodes.description: Compare using common denominator or cross-multiplication

nodes.name: Adding & Subtracting Fractions
nodes.description: Same and different denominators, mixed numbers

nodes.name: Multiplying & Dividing Fractions
nodes.description: Multiply numerators, reciprocal for division

nodes.name: Fraction of a Number
nodes.description: Find 3/4 of 60, fraction word problems

nodes.name: Decimals
nodes.description: Place value in decimals, operations, conversion to/from fractions

nodes.name: Percentage Basics
nodes.description: % means per hundred, convert fraction↔decimal↔%

nodes.name: Finding Percentage of a Number
nodes.description: Find X% of Y, reverse: find whole from part

nodes.name: Percentage Increase & Decrease
nodes.description: Increase/decrease by %, successive %, discount

nodes.name: Profit & Loss
nodes.description: CP, SP, profit%, loss%, marked price, discount

nodes.name: Simple Interest
nodes.description: P×R×T/100, find P/R/T, amount = P+SI

nodes.name: Compound Interest
nodes.description: A = P(1+R/100)^n, CI−SI difference, depreciation

nodes.name: Ratio Basics
nodes.description: Compare quantities, simplify ratios, equivalent ratios

nodes.name: Dividing in a Ratio
nodes.description: Divide a number in a given ratio

nodes.name: Proportion
nodes.description: If a:b = c:d, cross-multiplication, mean proportional

nodes.name: Direct & Inverse Variation
nodes.description: Direct: x/y constant. Inverse: x×y constant

nodes.name: Unitary Method
nodes.description: Find value of 1 unit, then scale

nodes.name: Variables & Expressions
nodes.description: Using letters for unknowns, forming expressions

nodes.name: Like Terms & Simplification
nodes.description: Combine like terms, simplify expressions

nodes.name: Two-Step Equations
nodes.description: Solve 3x+5=20, move constant then divide

nodes.name: Equations — Variables Both Sides
nodes.description: Solve 7x+3=4x+15, collect terms

nodes.name: Equations with Brackets
nodes.description: Expand then solve: 3(x+4)=21

nodes.name: Fraction Equations
nodes.description: Clear fractions by multiplying by LCM

nodes.name: Polynomials
nodes.description: Add, subtract, multiply polynomials

nodes.name: Algebraic Identities
nodes.description: (a+b)², (a−b)², a²−b², factorisation

nodes.name: Quadratic Equations
nodes.description: Solve by factoring, formula, completing the square

nodes.name: 2D Shapes
nodes.description: Identify and classify: triangle, rectangle, circle, polygon

nodes.name: 3D Shapes
nodes.description: Cube, cuboid, sphere, cylinder, cone — faces, edges, vertices

nodes.name: Types of Angles
nodes.description: Acute, obtuse, right, straight, reflex

nodes.name: Complementary & Supplementary
nodes.description: Complementary sum to 90°, supplementary sum to 180°

nodes.name: Triangle Properties
nodes.description: Angle sum=180°, types by sides and angles, inequality

nodes.name: Parallel Lines & Transversal
nodes.description: Corresponding, alternate, co-interior angles

nodes.name: Polygon Angles
nodes.description: Interior angle sum = (n−2)×180°, exterior angles

nodes.name: Congruence & Similarity
nodes.description: SSS, SAS, ASA, RHS, similar triangles, ratio of areas

nodes.name: Pythagoras Theorem
nodes.description: c²=a²+b², Pythagorean triplets, applications

nodes.name: Circle — Basics
nodes.description: Radius, diameter, chord, arc, sector, circumference, area

nodes.name: Circle — Advanced
nodes.description: Tangent properties, arc length, sector area, cyclic quadrilateral

nodes.name: Symmetry
nodes.description: Lines of symmetry, rotational symmetry

nodes.name: Perimeter
nodes.description: Perimeter of rectangle, square, triangle, circle

nodes.name: Area — Basic Shapes
nodes.description: Area of rectangle, square, triangle

nodes.name: Area — Advanced Shapes
nodes.description: Parallelogram, rhombus, trapezium, circle

nodes.name: Surface Area
nodes.description: TSA, LSA of cube, cuboid, cylinder

nodes.name: Volume
nodes.description: Volume of cube, cuboid, cylinder, cone, sphere

nodes.name: Speed-Distance-Time Basics
nodes.description: S=D/T, D=S×T, T=D/S

nodes.name: Speed Unit Conversion
nodes.description: km/hr ↔ m/s using ×5/18 or ×18/5

nodes.name: Average Speed
nodes.description: Total D ÷ Total T (NOT average of speeds!)

nodes.name: Train Problems
nodes.description: Train+pole, train+bridge, relative speed of trains

nodes.name: Work & Time
nodes.description: Rate = 1/days, combined work, pipes & cisterns

nodes.name: Average (Mean)
nodes.description: Sum/count, weighted average, adding/removing numbers

nodes.name: Median, Mode, Range
nodes.description: Middle value, most frequent, max−min

nodes.name: Data Interpretation
nodes.description: Read bar graphs, pie charts, tables, line graphs

nodes.name: Squares & Perfect Squares
nodes.description: n², memorise 1²-25², properties

nodes.name: Square Roots
nodes.description: √n, methods: estimation, division, factorisation

nodes.name: Cubes & Cube Roots
nodes.description: n³, memorise 1³-12³, cube roots

nodes.name: Laws of Indices
nodes.description: aᵐ×aⁿ, (aᵐ)ⁿ, a⁰=1, a⁻ⁿ=1/aⁿ

nodes.name: Surds
nodes.description: Simplify, rationalise, nested surds

nodes.name: Simple Patterns
nodes.description: Spot the rule, find the next number

nodes.name: Arithmetic Progression
nodes.description: Common difference, nth term = a+(n-1)d, sum formula

nodes.name: Geometric Progression
nodes.description: Common ratio, nth term, sum formula

nodes.name: Special Sequences
nodes.description: Triangular, Fibonacci, sum of squares/cubes formulas

nodes.name: Money & Transactions
nodes.description: Coins, bills, change, cost calculations

nodes.name: Measurement & Units
nodes.description: Length, weight, capacity — conversions

nodes.name: Time & Calendar
nodes.description: Reading clocks, duration, calendar, odd days, leap year

nodes.name: Age Problems
nodes.description: Past/future ages, age ratios, difference never changes

nodes.name: Sets & Venn Diagrams
nodes.description: Union, intersection, inclusion-exclusion

nodes.name: Counting & Combinatorics
nodes.description: nCr, handshakes, factorials, digit counting

nodes.name: Logarithms
nodes.description: log definition, laws, log equations

nodes.name: Trigonometry
nodes.description: sin/cos/tan, standard values, identities
